steps.title: Find one dimension from given info
steps.content:
The slant $AB = 86$, the height $h = 43$, and the radius $r$ form a right triangle (apex $A$, center of base, point $B$ on the rim). Apply Pythagoras:
$$r^2 = AB^2 - h^2 = 86^2 - 43^2 = 7396 - 1849 = 5547$$

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content:
Use the cone-volume formula $V = \tfrac{1}{3}\pi r^2 h$:
$$V = \tfrac{1}{3}\pi(5547)(43) = \pi(1849)(43) = 79507\pi$$
So $k = 79507$. The answer is 79507.
